title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MASALASA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF VICTORIA, PROVINCE OF TARLAC.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3388 / 57 OG No. 8, 1371 (February 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2817, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MASALASA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF VICTORIA, PROVINCE OF TARLAC.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Masalasa and Balingog in the Municipality of Victoria, Province of Tarlac, are constituted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Masalasa.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
